channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Joel Embiid sustains sinus fracture fighting for rebound, misses 2nd half of 76ers' loss to Pacers
item.description: Joel Embiid sustained a sinus fracture when he was struck in the face going for a defensive rebound late in the first half of the Philadelphia 76ers’ loss to the Indiana Pacers on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Lindsey Vonn eager for her return to World Cup ski races next weekend in Switzerland at age 40
item.description: BEAVER CREEK, Colo. (AP) — Lindsey Vonn now has a firm target for her return to World Cup ski racing at age 40: next weekend for a pair of super-G events in St. Moritz, Switzerland. She has a goal, too, and it's not showing up at the starting gate simply to show up.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Cubs acquire All-Star outfielder Kyle Tucker in trade with the Astros
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Chicago Cubs acquired All-Star outfielder Kyle Tucker in a trade with the Houston Astros on Friday, paying a big price for one of baseball's best hitters.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Taylor Swift will only get $10 birthday present from Travis Kelce's dad
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs tight end Travis Kelce's father, Ed Kelce, said that he plans to only spend $10 on a gift for Taylor Swift's 35th birthday this year.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trae Young, Hawks hoping to win big in Vegas at the NBA Cup semifinals
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Trae Young might be the NBA's biggest enigma. Young's fans can point to numbers and say he's an elite player. His detractors can point to numbers and say he's overrated. Both arguments have validity. To some, his cocky ways are endearing. To others, they're infuriating.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: WNBA owner questions why Caitlin Clark was named Time Athlete of the Year, suggests it will cause racism
item.description: Washington Mystics owner Sheila Johnson said that Time Magazine should have put the whole WNBA on its cover instead of just Caitlin Clark.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: De'Vondre Campbell won't be part of the 49ers after his refusal to enter a game, Kyle Shanahan says
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — San Francisco coach Kyle Shanahan said linebacker De'Vondre Campbell won't be part of the 49ers moving forward after he refused to enter a game after losing his starting job.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Mariah Carey set to kick off NFL Christmas Gameday with pre-taped performance
item.description: Following the abrupt cancellation of Mariah Carey's sold-out Pittsburgh concert, Netflix has announced that the pop diva will kick off its Christmas Day football broadcast.
item.dc:creator: Karu F Daniels, The Mercury News

item.title: Chiefs rookie Xavier Worthy calls it 'dream come true' having Patrick Mahomes as his quarterback
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs rookie Xavier Worthy discussed his relationship with quarterback Patrick Mahomes, saying it is a "dream come true" to have the 3-time MVP leading him.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rams outlast 49ers with zero touchdowns scored in pivotal NFC West matchup
item.description: No one expected two of the best offenses in the league recently to put up no touchdowns in this game, but the Rams were able to outlast the 49ers doing so in this pivotal division game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 49ers LB De'Vondre Campbell refuses to enter game after losing his starting spot
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — San Francisco linebacker De'Vondre Campbell refused to enter Thursday night's game in the third quarter after losing his starting job when Dre Greenlaw returned from an injury.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bill Belichick says he spoke with UNC legends, including Michael Jordan and Lawrence Taylor, before taking job
item.description: Bill Belichick joined North Carolina on a five-year deal, but he did not accept the contract without first speaking to some of the school's legends.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Burglaries targeting professional athletes 'epidemic': Security expert
item.description: FBI officials say a string of burglaries targeting athletes may be connected and carried out by a transnational group
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Wander Franco trial postponed due to no-show witnesses
item.description: Tampa Bay Rays shortstop Wander Franco is scheduled to go to trial Thursday in the Dominican Republic in a sexual abuse case involving a 14-year-old girl.
item.dc:creator: MARTÍN ADAMES Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Lawmaker wants ‘flag planting’ at OSU to be a felony
item.description: Days after the postgame melee, a lawmaker introduced a bill that would make “flag planting” within Ohio Stadium a felony.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, NewsNation

item.title: Bill Belichick considering offer to be UNC Chapel Hill head football coach
item.description: CHAPEL HILL, N.C. (WGHP) — Bill Belichick is in negotiations to potentially become the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill's next head coach. InsideCarolina’s Grant Hughes first reported that Belichick interviewed for the job earlier this week.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, NewsNation

item.title: Miami's Ward, Oregon's Gabriel, Colorado's Hunter, Boise State’s Jeanty, are named Heisman finalists
item.description: Oregon's Dillon Gabriel, Colorado's Travis Hunter, Boise State’s Ashton Jeanty, and Miami's Cam Ward were announced as the Heisman Trophy finalists on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON AP College Football Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Mendenhall excited to take over at Utah State
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The Bronco Mendenhall era has begun at Utah State. Mendenhall was introduced as the Aggies new head football coach Monday, and the school is hoping he can turn the program around.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: How to watch 'Monday Night Football' in 'The Simpsons' universe
item.description: The prime-time matchup between the Cincinnati Bengals and Dallas Cowboys will also take place at Springfield’s Atoms Stadium as part of “The Simpsons Funday Football” alternate broadcast.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: CU Buffaloes & CSU Rams are bowl eligible
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— If you're struggling to remember, you're not alone. But the University of Colorado and Colorado State University are changing that narrative this year. For the first time since 2016, both Colorado schools are bowling this postseason. First up, No. 23 Colorado.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Allen sets NFL mark with 3 TD passes and 3 TD runs, but Stafford's Rams hold off Bills 44-42
item.description: Matthew Stafford and the Los Angeles Rams had to pile up a veritable mountain of points, yards and time-of-possession advantage early on to give themselves even a chance against the Buffalo Bills' ferocious fourth-quarter rally and a historic six-touchdown performance by Josh Allen.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Saints QB Derek Carr injures left hand on dive in 4th quarter of win over Giants
item.description: New Orleans Saints quarterback Derek Carr injured his left hand late in the fourth quarter of Sunday's 14-11 victory over the New York Giants when he went airborne while trying for a first down and crashed to the turf.
item.dc:creator: TOM CANAVAN, Associated Press, Fox 5
